results.releaseNotes:
• New dedicated Journal, Symptoms, Screen with Tomsk & Cumiana charts Combo!
• Forum Notifications Filter by Favorite Authors and Topics
• GCP 2.0 History (48 hours)
• Space: WSA-ENLIL added
• Fix for timezones East of Tomsk

Previously added:

• Tomsk Spectrogram 3 & 4 day, 1 & 2 Week versions! Included. Right on the main page. Tap, zoom, drag, share, download!
• Player: Angel & Planetary Frequencies. Can now Play in the backgrounded or locked. Make a Planetary Playlist, set your device aside, let it play you to sleep!
• Forum Comments mute-able by Author

• If you ever need anything, just Contact us right in the App! We're happy to help.
results.description:
We are the OG Schumann Resonances App — since 2019

A quick snapshot of what is going on with the Earth's heartbeat — the Schumann Resonance!

Highlighted Features in this version:

• New dedicated Journal page with your reported Symptoms, and a Combo of Tomsk & Cumiana Charts, in one view!
• Share Symptoms with the Community! Automatically logged to the Journal
• Tomsk 3, 4, 7, and 14 day versions! • available Nowhere else 
• Tomsk Chart Overlays with timezone comparison
• Calendar date picker for past Tomsk charts • available Nowhere else 
• Forum discussion with fellow Schumann Resonance followers!
• Dedicated Learn screen 
• Dark/Light mode + customizable UI 
• Planetary K-index (Kp), and Solar coronagraph images & videos Screens 
• iOS widget with live spectrogram & key values 
• All major VLF stations: Cumiana, Nicolosi, Virgo, SOS Enattos, Landes 
• Binaural beats added to the Unique and innovative Live Audio Player! (Plays Schumann Harmonics, Solfeggio, Nogier Healing, Chakra, and now Planetary Frequencies) 
• Quick-glance row for all current Schumann data 

Listen to the Current Fundamental Frequency with or without Binaural beats (Subscriber Bonus) — plus Nogier Healing, Chakra, Planetary, and Solfeggio frequencies

Interact with 32 days of live Tomsk data — Spectrogram, Amplitude (Power), Frequency, and Q-Factor all on one dynamic chart (Subscriber Bonus)

This is a simple but powerful App that we've worked hard to make great, for both the Beginner and the Practitioner:

• Real-time view of the Schumann Resonance in one convenient place 
• Pinch to zoom, drag, save and share all charts (including the all-in-one view) 
• Historical images: Spectrogram, Amplitude, Frequencies, Q-factor, Electromagnetic, and all Cumiana charts (Subscriber Bonus)

See the Spike percentage when the Resonance is spiking!

*** FREE push notifications — get alerted for Spikes, Amplitude, or both *** • the latter available Nowhere else

Some Additional Features:

• Global Consciousness Project (GCP 2.0) dot, now with 48-hour History
• Tomsk “Blackout” Notifications (Subscriber Bonus), Tomsk blackouts are also available included at the top of the Tomsk screen
• Choose what the Amplitude number shows: Current, Today's Peak, or Yesterday's Peak
• Helpful tooltips to learn how to read the charts

Also check out our Community listings, and find Awesome Schumann Affiliates to follow and connect!

This is an essential tool for following, practicing, learning about, and participating in the Collective Consciousness, Ascension, Meditation, and staying connected to Earth's energy

Languages: Content, in: English, Czech, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Dannish, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Swedish, Chinese, Turkish, Dutch

Permissions note: Limited photo access may be requested, exclusively for Forum subscriber profiles, and is not used in any other way.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Privacy Policy: https://schumann-resonance.org/privacy-policy/
